content.content:
After an easier than expected electoral triumph against Quincy Sharp, you now have powers greater than you've ever seen before to change everything inside of Gotham.

However, power is never without its cost. For every power gained, a reflection imparts its influence on something else. If power doesn't corrupts you, it will corrupt someone else.

Yet, as the stakes have never been higher, it is on you to finally break the cycle. Gotham's fate was never a fatality.

Gang Massacre: 20 found dead in Crime Alley following all out brawl. The police is on the search. Commissioner James Gordon has promised closer police oversight of the area. As the year begins, inflation nationwide seems to be increasing at a rate of 2.56%.

content.content: Full legalization or decriminalization of prostitution falls outside the mayor's authority and is not on the table. The question is not whether to solve the crisis entirely, it is whether to stop the city from actively making it worse.

options.title: We need a fair map, nothing more, nothing less.

For decades, this city as favored unjustly one party over the other. One party that has brought this city to the brink multiple time. It's now time for the council to do away with those reactionaries.

I think there is a part of the city that is willing to bring change, but the other simply is not ready for it. We need to bring about drastic changes. The city seats should reflect those that trully want to bring out change more than those that won't.

content.content: While the american system naturally trends towards a certain impossible to limit level of corruption and inequality, the deck of Gotham city is so crooked the top card is getting dusty. While profound reform of the city will be the hardest to implement, they are also the most important.
The map of council districts inside of the city is profoundly gerrymandered. This ought to change.

The current map heavily favors white voters over minorities, packing and cracking communities allowing the republican party to maintain majorities even when the city wide election doesn't go their way. Yet, by that matter, it became a deeply partisan issue.
(Show breakdown of seats per population of the current map)
To change the map, you will require an absolute majority vote of the very same councilor that stand to run for them every 2 years. Here are the following potential plans:

Gotham City, as a town more populated than some countries, has many time being described as an island in it of itself which system of governance is vastly separated from the broader system of politics of the nation. This however has not allowed them safe-guard against the domination of the two party system. Yet, here, instead of political factions, oppositions between liberal and conservatives have rather focused on individual cliques, personal popularity system and influence rather than ideology. This symptom caused by the corruption of the City is however slowly loosing it's steam especially as new comers enter the scene of the Town.
Unlike the rest of the state of New Jersey, Gotham City dispose of a much more centralized municipal system closer to that of New York City. The seperation of powers is thus:
Represented by the Mayor of Gotham City and Borough Mayors elected for renewable 4 year mandate by a majority of the vote of the people in a one round election cycle.
The Mayor of the city dispose of the following executive powers:

• Appointing and firing the heads of the following position at will and without required cause: Police Commissioner, Fire Commissioner, Schools Chancellor, Department of Health Commissioner, Sanitation Commissioner.
• Proposing and managing the City Budget.

• Issuing executive orders: Establishment of new offices and task force, Directing Agency behavior, Reorganizing government Structure under it's jurisdiction, Establishing state of emergency policies and guiding Policy Priorities.
• Control of the Gotham Police Department (GPD): directing policing strategy, deploying officers, setting enforcement priorities
• Vetoing legislation passed by the City Council
• Negotiating labor contracts with city unions

The Legislative branch of the City is led by the City Council. It's an Unicameral body consisting of 65 council members representing each discricts of the city containing on average 150 000 individuals for 4 years renewable terms. The City Council is directed by a Speaker which is elected by it's members.

In practice, this make the second most powerful position in Gotham city a story that was many time mirred in corruption and patronage considering it's influence and power. The position of the speaker being in control of the legislative Calendar, influencing which bills will be voted on on which day as well as vast influence on budget spending and it's negociation.
As a Unit, the City council powers include:

• Introducing and voting on legislation pertaining to the city. After it's introduction and approval by comittee, the legislation is passed by a simple majority vote to be sent and signed by the mayor. If the bill is vetoed, the council has 30 days to overide it with a two-third majority vote (44 votes). Once signed, the bill becomes law.
• Negotiating and Approving the city's budget.
• Approving mayoral appointees to the Department of Investigation as well as various board and commission members across the city.

The control of the Department of Investigation by the Executive and legislative Branch has of course caused a large amount of controversy in the city as councilor push for a tendency of self policing rotting the system from it's inside. The current DOI commissionner that as been appointed under Quincy Sharp need to have the reason of it's removal made public for it to be valid, this may turn into a political quagmire unless a deal can be reached, a resignation can be forced or some other opportunities to lower the shield of the legislature and municipal corruption.

Unlike the Executive and Legislative, the Judicial branch partly transcend the bondaries of the city as while municipal court are localy controlled, regulating minor offenses, each higher court is under the jurisdiction of the state and de-facto, the governor.

The Superior Court's representing each of New Jersey's 21 Counties and Gotham, treating of high crimes and finally the supreme court of New Jersey dealing with crimes and legal issues of even higher order.

Prosecutors are appointed by the city council on the municipal level while county and state level are appointed by the governor and state senate. While Municipal Prosecutors and the Attorney General do not serve fixed terms, County prosecutors are appointed for 5 years.

city_reform.fair_map.subtitle: While difficult, you possess two avenues to reach it, either through the court or through the city. If passed, it will see the council finally be represent it's actual population.

options.title: We will go through the court. We will make clear that the current map as a Racially based gerrymandering. The excuse of it being done by wealth can only go so far when a city with a third of it's population being from minority groups only has 13% of it's councilors from such communities.
We will go through the hardest point, through the city council. It will require all strength to achieve it, but it's our ticket for change in this city.

content.content:
After an easier than expected electoral triumph against Quincy Sharp, you now have powers greater than you've ever seen before to change everything inside of Gotham.

However, power is never without its cost. For every power gained, a reflection imparts its influence on something else. If power doesn't corrupts you, it will corrupt someone else.

Yet, as the stakes have never been higher, it is on you to finally break the cycle. Gotham's fate was never a fatality.

Given our defeat in the Prussian coup, the far-right appears to be ascendant.
However, Chancellor Brüning's austerity policies and the continuation of the depression are paving the way for Hitler, or someone like him, to take power.

Blood spilled on the pavement, the wind ripping away the last warmth you felt, you felt nothing else in this place to move forward.
As you moved home, your life had been irrevocably derailed, you needed to find one way out.

We need to repeal the cross-dressing ordinance. The law was never about public safety, it's a tool of persecution, and it should be abolished entirely.

We need to talk to Milton Finger. To many person are being persecuted for nothing more than their sexual orientation. We need to pressure the Governor into passing state-level legislation criminalizing hate crimes targeting LGBT individuals.

content: For a long time a relatively minor group in America, it as been steadily rising ever since the 60's. Concerning mostly the Youth, minorities and out of jobs Blue collar worker, they tend to support whoever will give them a job and whoever won't take away their unemployement benefits. If their number rises high however, no amount of pandering to their position will convince them that you simply need more time as their uncertain future pushes them toward imediate solutions, not long term planning. (They are around 8% of the population at game start)

What used to be the majority of the city population back when Gotham was an industrial Hub. As the town as shifted away from the power of industry, their numbers have been dwindling and so have their welfare. While once Reliable Blue Voters, Union Busting and De-industrialization have since shifted them the center and now are sensitive to populist rhetoric and whichever support their jobs the most. They represent 30% of the population yet have low participation rate in elections.

From the Pizza restaurants, self employed to market chains owners, a significant part of the population of Gotham are what could be called the old middle class or "petty bourgeoisie". Possessing their own Capital of production as well as societal and economic concerns that are in contradiction to much of the working class, they tend to be much more conservative no matter their actual economic well being. While representing only 10 to 15% of the population, they are very reliable voters for the republican party.

As the economics of the city shift away from manual labor in factories toward skyscrappers of glass filled with offices, the population of the city as gained a vast number of jobs pertaining to the new middle Class. Under Salaries much like Blue Collar workers but generally much better off and tending to have higher level of education, this part of the population tend to lean toward liberalism which generally see them lean toward the democratic party though a vast part of them remain Republican. As 30% of the population, they represent another active block of voters which while generally unable to change elections as they are always voting, they grant parties strong bases of support for both parties.

Up until recently, the largest minority of voters of the City came from the Black Community. While indivually part of every other class previously mentionned, the Black population as tended to vote as a united block toward issues favoring their enfranchisement. As such, they have been extremely reliable Democratic voters. However, they have also been known to refuse to vote for any candidate if neither represent their values with enough strength, a phenomenon that as become more frequent as of late. They represent around 15% of the population in the city.

The fastest growing minority of the city and also the least politically active. While skewing toward the left on economic issues, as they skew toward the right on social ones, they have become a generally uninvolved part of the political spectrum which usually tilts democrat but remain in search of candidates that would better represent their issues. Profoundly anti-establishment, they will flock to populist candidate or Candidates that make facing the issues they have part of their platform. They represent around 15% of the population

content.content: We have won the civil war against the reactionary forces. Germany will be changed forever, but it is too early to know how.

content.content: This is an hostile takeover plain and simple. They will ask for a lot. Still, if ends justify the means...

options.title: They have done enough damage. This city deserves better than this rot. Clean up the board.
We've all seen the damage that they've done. It is now time that they enter new management
I have to convince them this is the only way out of this place. I know they fear giving any power to others, yet as the situation stands, we cannot let that den of corruption remain.

I know the irony of ending Corruption through the use of corruption, but the situation calls for it. They're many that will sell their souls for imediate gain and eternal damnation. We will contact them, give them a price. Once it is done, the rest will follow.

content.content: Welcome to your nightmare. Every expansion, every new building, every new practice must be approved by the board before application. As with much of the legislative organ of the city, the business board is a den of corruption, currently in a fair equilibrium that lets all abuse it. You are not usually one of its adversaries, but if this town is to prosper, it must be reformed. The board starts Corrupt. When you pick this card, you may pursue one of two paths: clean it up, or subdue it to your interests.

business_board_action.put_technocrats.subtitle: Economics doesn't need ideology or favoritism. It's time to hand the board over to people who simply know what they are doing.

content.content: For the first time in decades, the business board is once more acting as an impartial judge of the current affairs of businesses. Still, as Mayor, you can softly push things toward the way you think are the best, the choice is yours.

Now under your's and Thorne's control, the board ias become not the plaything of thousand but only two individuals. There's tension in every couple, make sure it develops smoothly through to it's natural end.
The board is now under your direct command. Whoever you appoint, whoever you call to act will have to obey your words. Anything in the future is but a few ink drops away from reality.

civil_rights.bar_raids.subtitle: A direct executive directive to the police to cease raids on LGBT bars and establishments removes one of the most visible and brutalizing tools of suppression the city has used. While Gordon as never validated any, the simple fact they can still happen is intolerable. It costs no legislative capital and can be done immediately. Some Policemen and councilors may not understand just yet, but they soon will.

city_reform.bruce_gerrymandering.subtitle: Gerrymandering the council map to support groups that support you is seen as the most corrupt breach of conduct and attempt of taking power anyone could describe. You will need an incredible amount of support to make it past the 43 seat required as both establishment democrats and republicans will act against it. We won't be able to pass it until a year after it is done.

deputizing.deputizing_polka.subtitle: This vilains of circumstance seems more than willing to fight for justice. While some will jeer at his inclusion, no serious person would see him as a liability.

content.content: As the city still need all the help from private individual it can get if it is to stem crime in the city, you can add new names to the list of heroes of Gotham. However, each of them will need the approval from both the county prosecutor and the police comissioner to be approved, no matter how useful they may be.

Let's reopen the Old Gotham chapter.

Can we close some charities instead?
Let's go back to the start.

Let's call Oliver Queen. We are reflection of each other, just on other side of the country. We've need to renew our agreement. We did it in the past, we certainly can come to one now. He remains our main provider of equipment as I'm he's.
It has became just too politically risky to continue associating with Oliver. I'll give him a call and we'll part our ways for a while.

Let's get into contact with Gnomon. Doug Thomas help as been instrumental in making Dick Grayson's gear and their light emitting tech is the best in the industry. Theirs no reason for us not to shake hand.

I always had a great rapport with Ferris Boyle. However, I have feeling that not everything is as they seem with his company. I think that it would be better if our collaboration where to be stopped now.

civil_rights.equal_employment.subtitle: A municipal ordinance barring employment discrimination based on sexual orientation covers city employees, city contractors, and any business subject to city licensing. It does not reach purely private employers beyond the city's regulatory reach, but it establishes a legal floor and a public standard. Expect council opposition from socially conservative members, though the ordinance is defensible on basic fairness grounds.

options.title: Let's undergo a substantial reform of the department. There is so much things wrong only a full and complete change of the guard can be enough to bring back a sense of normality.
Let's try to remove the main culprit. Arnold Flass represent everything that is wrong in the governmental structure of Gotham, perhaps even more than Thorne. He needs to go.

content.content: The current head of the department of investigation, Arnold Flass, is known to be corrupt and to help his crooks inside the council. However, Rupert Thorne and his crooks would lock up the council if you dare to strike their man without reason. If you do have them, it opens the door both to judicial investigation and further reform eliminating corruption from future candidate.

labor_affairs.labor_hours.subtitle: This Subject is seen as Toxic by the council.

game_over.long_war.title: Germany is gripped by civil war.

content.content: Germany is currently in the grip of a civil war, a brutal affair that has no obvious end. Thousands of lives have already been extinguished, and it is likely that the war will not stop until Germany's cities are reduced to ruins.
The current conditions are not favorable for us.
Our cause is popular in the West, but their sclerotic governments are reluctant to send us aid.
The Soviet Union has aided the Communists, but not the socialists and democrats, in an attempt to shape Germany's future government.
Poland and Czechoslovakia have sent some assistance against the fascists.

options.title: We need to close our Burnely chapter.
We need to close our Somerset chapter.
We need to close our Bristol chapter.
We need to close our Old Gotham chapter.
We need to close our New Gotham chapter.
We need to close our Burnside chapter.
The situation in Old Gotham is getting bad, let's build a new chapter in there.
Can we open some charities instead?
Let's go back to the start.
Let's call on our usual backers. Wayne Inc. has been on the up for a dozen year, I'm certain they can put a bit more money into it.
Let's call on our friend Oliver Queen. I've been a buyer of the equipment from his company for years, it's only right he gives some back in return.
Let's call on this new rising star, Roman Sionis. I'm certain he has an eye for the development we are bringing to the community.
Let's call on the greatest business man of the city. Lincoln March has reached his place for a reason. I'm certain we can come to an agreement.
Let's call on the people's CEO. Ferris Boyle really did the impossible in turning around Dagget's dying branches, I'm certain he'd be interested in Wayne industries.
Let's Call the boy wonder, Edward Nashton. He seem to have a bit of a complex about me, but I think we can come to an agreement. We don't have to be Rivals.
Let's call on the devil. Lex is not stupid, he knows what I can bring to him. I've helped him before, I'm certain he can give some in return.
Let's call Selina. I've given her a chance many think she doesn't deserve. She shouldn't have issues paying back on it.

content.content: Businesses sure are expensive. While Our campaign expenses are not tied to our personal fund anymore as an elected official, we must continue to woo in investors and good relations if we are to have the necessary funds to fuffill each objectives that cannot be done through municipal actions. Where would we find our Funds?

civil_rights.cross_dressing.subtitle: The ordinance criminalizing cross-dressing with "intent to deceive" has been used almost exclusively to arrest drag performers and transgender individuals. Its repeal requires a council vote but is achievable with the right coalition. The legal argument for repeal is strong, the ordinance is vague, selectively enforced, and constitutionally questionable. The political argument is harder in certain districts, but framing it as ending an enforcement absurdity rather than a cultural statement can help bring reluctant votes across.

city_reform.doi_vote.subtitle: Needs a simple majority vote. Corrupt councilors will always vote no no matter how much you pay them.

options.title: We need to reform the city safety and work standards:
We need to reinforce their Job and contract security.
We need to support their right to overtime pay.
We need to support a salary increase for workers.
We need to support workers pension.
We need to support Worker's Healthcare Benefit.
We need to renegotiate the workers Working Hours.
We need to do something about Lonnie Machin...

content.content: Union busting as been the unsaid policy of the Quincy Sharp Year's, however, they have since become much stronger and organized since Lonnie Machin's ascension. If you are to avoid their wrath, a proactive position on Union right's whould help satisfy their needs.
You may push the following reforms to the City council:
Otto Braun has been elected as President of Germany. He had never desired to be the most powerful man in Germany, but now he is.

options.title: You trained with the arm of the demon
You trained with daughter of the demon
You trained with the voice of the demon

content.content: As the years sharpened you, Alfred was always by your side to guide you into a much better man than you would have been without him, you eventually found that if anything ought to change, you had to emancipate from him to fight for justice.
As training continued, words reached you from a strange group fighting corruption in the Himalayas.
They had seen much potential in you and gave you the opportunity to finally have the tools necessary to push the change you wanted to see.
You only had to prove yourself against one of them.

civil_rights.lgbtq_governor.subtitle: The Governor is broadly sympathetic to the cause but has avoided moving on it without political cover. Your endorsement and the expenditure of real capital can provide that cover and push the legislation through Albany. The impact extends far beyond Gotham, a statewide hate crime law protects LGBT residents in every city and county, and the credit for pushing it will follow you.

content.content: For every right a person claims, there's another man that will tell him to remember his duties. However, those that have not the right to exist as they should be, what would those duties even be? This is the delta in this world that cause persons to hunt one another. It's your duty, the one with all rights to finally write out this injustice.

city_reform.arnold_flass.subtitle: Thorne is ready to give you those token reforms. In would however ask you to give him something in exchange.

options.title: Thorne can be bought by anyone with enough money, let him say his price, i'll pay it.
We've worked together previously, I'm certain he can let it go for this one that is just bringing heat onto us.

taxation.high.subtitle: Will end the flat taxation while limiting the amount of people scorned.

special_case.jason.subtitle: Give you all the info on Jason's Death

content.content: Kurt Schumacher has been elected as President of Germany. As a young and ambitious SPD member, he will be shaping Germany for years to come.

city_reform.bribe_thorne.subtitle: At the cost of a substantial amount of PF's, he will abandon his stooge.

public_transport.lease.subtitle: Cabs should not be exploited and this current exploitation needs to end now!

taxation.commuter.subtitle: Will require a conversation with the governor and most likely concession in return.

content.content: Marie Juchacz has been elected as President of Germany. She is the first woman to be elected as the head of state of any republic, and will contribute to shaping Germany for years to come.

options.title: We need to reform the electoral system.
We need to reform the department of investigation.

content.content: Herein contains relevant information about the government, history, mechanics and politics of the Gotham City and it's governance.

Albert Einstein, possibly the most famous scientist in the world, has been elected as President of Germany. As a German Jew and a pacifist, he is the repudiation of everything the Nazis stood for, and a symbol of a new German Republic that has moved beyond its checkered past.

options.title: Matt Hagen as faded from view since he tried getting back on those responsible for transformation. I know he is still out there, somewhere. His condition requires constant upkeep after all.
The Calendar Girl remains an issue many have pushed me to act against, especially Sionis. I think it would be good to finally resolve it before she cause the death of someone else.
Pamela Isley as never stopped her crusade against the patriarchy and pollution. No matter the justice behind her acts, she can't be allowed to continue her domestic Eco-terrorism.
I've seen Solomon Grundy, I'm certain I've seen him died multiple time before. As incomprehensible as he, that force of nature must be contained somehow before he causes more damage.
Andrea is still somewhere, out there. She did not stop her brutal fight for her vision of justice simply because of my own acts. I need to find her.

Francine Langstrom is still looking for her husband since that fateful meeting between the two of them. If report are correct, he lost much of who he was. He need our help before he changes even further.
This so called "Father Blackfire" is a threat to the city. His Super Hero cult can't be allowed to prosper if we are to maintain the sanity of the town.
The Holiday killer is still out there. He seems to have grown more sloppy after the years, thinking he can get away with everything... Still, he must be stopped before he kills more people.
Jason's body was never recovered. I know the explosion likely burned all that remained of him, but their must have been something left... Something to give closure.

There has been a secret society operating beneath our city, this "Court of Owls" seems responsible for much of the pain the town as been suffering since decades. They can't be allowed to continue their puppetering of the city.
The Zodiac Cult seems to have been fanatical supporter for this "Calendar Man". He seems to have been working just like the Holiday killer. He cannot be left to continue his deeds.
This "Red X" seems like a strange a sudden vigilante. Their is something familliar about him but I can't be to certain of who he may be. I simply have to make sure.

content: The SPD is still in government, under Chancellor
. Given the circumstances, this is a substantial accomplishment.

    speak(element3, .7);

options.title: I found Echo in the Dao. Life is an eternal flow that can never be severed, only guided one way or another toward a great whole in an eternal metamorphosis.
I found Duty in Kong Fuzi's teachings. Each person has a duty to serve the other and harmony may be reached once each achieves virtue.
I found clarity in the Legalist writing. Law must be instilled into each individual until their will becomes true and their act correct.
I found Truth in Mozi's ideals. No one dogma is self sufficient, only the acts that help the widest amount of people, never to break their will.
I found very little of interest among any of those teachings.
I found that I despised this idea of teaching what the truth is to others and set on my own path.

content.content: 1980, In the court of the underking
In the year of grueling training under the guidance of the demon's head, Ra's al Ghul, you've found yourself to be his most apt student.
The immortal ideals were quite foreign to you as his sensibilities seem to have deep roots in oriental philosophies.
The gap between the training of the body and that of the mind certainly was disorienting,
with time, with recollection… You found something good to be taken from the schools of Chinese thought.

police.police_equipment.subtitle: Since the Hamilton Hill years, armed robbers have been answered by bullet proof vest, assault riffles by armored cars. Today, the constant arm race continues.

public_transport.tech.subtitle: The drivers are driving with decade old technology that limit both their efficiency and put them into unnecessary risk.

options.title: Buy up new cars (if you have bought the leasing companies)

content.content: The KPD has won power in Germany, with our assistance. They will try to remake Germany in the Soviet image. How much they succeed is yet to be determined.

content: Other fees and other (include commuter tax that represent 0.5B)

options.title: Let's analyse our policy on firearms.
We need to consult the situation with our officer armor: The ballistic vests.
Gotham City's small fleet of APCs.
Non Lethal weaponry, such as tasers.

taxation.abolish.subtitle: Overwhelmingly popular but will need to be compensated with other revenue source.

options.title: Let's explore Property Taxes, our main avenue of revenue.
Let's explore Income Tax, the one everyone know.
Let's explore sales tax, the most unpopular one.

content.content: No one want to pay them, but if anything is to get done in the City, money as to be taken from somewhere. The previous administration have been rather light on taxation, seemingly rather found of the ideas of Flat Taxes espoused by Steve Forbes. In the current situation, while the town isn't getting poorer, further increase in taxation would do a great amount of good if things are to be built and reform throughout the city.
Our government has enacted a public works program!

police.police_equipment_unit_armament_fi.subtitle: While a gun isn't the answer to all altercation, trying to pull it away from cops while the crime rate stays high is a recipe for disaster.

game_over.unemployment_reduced.title: Unemployment has been reduced from its peak.

content.content: While still uncomfortably high, unemployment levels are nowhere near their peak. This is a success of our economic policy.

police.police_equipment_unit_armament_ve.subtitle: A particular pain point for Gordon, while their is a vest for everyone, it's not one as safe as it used to be. Cop Killer bullet have become ubiquitous as the town continue to evolve and arm traffickers continue to prosper. For every new bullet, their need to be a new vest.

content.content: Public transportation inside of Gotham is a lifeblood that is keeping the entire city from breaking upon it's own car dependency. They have since become universal in support and universal in the requirement for them not to cost any money and not to disrupt them in any way. Which of the great pillars of Gothamite transportation would you wish to invest upon?
Unemployment levels have fallen substantially! This is a success of our economic policy.

police.police_equipment_unit_armament_ap.subtitle: Quincy Sharp's APC's have been rather controversial considering their lack of subtilty and the general disturbance they tend to cause. As they are in inventory, the police is constantly in want of using them.

content.content: Unemployment is still at dangerously high levels. Even though Hitler is not in power, the situation is ripe for instability and extremism.

police.police_equipment_unit_armament_ri.subtitle: Quincy Sharp as vastly increased the funding for them. Some see it as a life line for the city, other as keeping the rabble of the street.

game_over.emergency_government.title: SPD ruling in an emergency government.

content: The SPD is ruling as part of an emergency minority government, led by President
. This is a temporary and unstable arrangement, leaving the door open to further authoritarianism.

police.police_equipment_unit_armament_no.subtitle: While "technically" part of the Gotham police arsenal, those kind of weapons have been gathering dust lately

content.content: The SPD has been declared a "People's Party", representing all of the people, not just the working class. This policy has many supporters and detractors, and what will become of the party is still unclear.

game_over.nationalization_achieved.title: Socialization of the economy has commenced.

content.content: As part of our socialist economic plan, we have nationalized a substantial portion of the economy, beginning the transition to actual socialism.

options.title: You tried to stop Him, Physically.
You tried to talk him out of his plan.
You decided to let him go and stay silent on the issue.
You decided to let him go and confronted Shiva and Ra’s about the issue he raised

content.content: As you became David's trusted lieutenant, what used to only be professional issues slowly mellowed as both of you learned more about each other.
One night, he would come to you to inform you of his immediate leaving of the League with his daughter Cassandra following an experiment done on her mind turning her into a killing machine at age 5.
While he trusted the goals of Ra's, he could no longer stand by its methods and is advising you to do the same.

police.police_equipment_unit_tech_gps.subtitle: So useful people wonder how they ever did anything without them.

content.content: Works councils now have substantially greater influence, giving workers democratic control over their economic lives.

charities.charity_canaries_1.subtitle: Dinah Drake Always need more funds when it come to helping people.

police.police_equipment_unit_tech_cctv.subtitle: Keep an eye out for crime, help prevent it and also make the general public very paranoid.

options.title: Light Amplificators (Wayne Tech + Doug Thomas Contact)

content.content: We have helped to form a European Union to bring peace and prosperity to the continent. Time will tell how effective it will be.

content.content: Before entering politics, your main avenue to limit the poverty of the city where through the vast charities that you've developed. However, even today, they have prooved most effective to fill the gaps welfare cannot reach as well as improving both your credibility and your popularity in a pularity from a purely Amoral Standpoint. How would you like to develop it further?

police.police_equipment_unit_tech_bodyca.subtitle: Police officers despise it, the general public love it. It may be the best way to prevent police abuse

options.title: Ra's as already prepared for it, Talia will be ready to succeed her father.
Shiva is right. Someone needs to take his place. Maybe she could be it?
As it stands, no one can succeed him. However, if the situation calls for it, I'll volunteer.
I do not think the immortal will die just yet. I'm certain there is a way to cure his condition.
It's somewhat of a relief. I found people centuries younger than him that already lived too long.
Ra's is a man like any other under the weight of age. If he is to fade away, that is not for me to decide what comes next.

content.content: You entered a tight circle around Ra's. While your position with him never fully matched one to one, there is trust between the two of you that was built.

Shiva would bring you into the deepest lair's of the Demon's head under the mountain, a place nearly no person had ever seen, something sickly, something ancient brewing in a vast pool of what looked closer to an acid than a normal liquid.
In the distance, a body was set inside, disheveled and… In barely a few instant, recovered to the form you knew of Ra's. In that display however, a few words were told by the trusted voice.
“The Emperor is fading. His body may not look like it just yet, but I've seen it. Unless we fall by the sword, he won't survive us.”
“If we want to survive him, someone needs to take his place.”
Silence returned to the room, as he marched toward you, you spoke to him, but in a way, he was now already faded where he stood.

police.police_equipment_unit_tech_forens.subtitle: As crime continue to become more sophisticated, the fight against crime need to become just as developed.

police.police_equipment_unit_tech_drones.subtitle: Science fiction for most. However, a camera that moves and can track anyone in the city would change everything.

police.police_equipment_unit_tech_helico.subtitle: The greatest love of Quincy Sharp. The police force as an unhealthy number of them, many of which are not as useful as they should be.

police.police_practice.subtitle: Gotham has many type of criminals, however, no one is in agreement on who should be targeted in priority. It's for you to decide on it.

content.content: GCPD currently concentrates on violent crime with a documented bias toward minority and blue-collar communities. Overpolicing remained the stated policy since before the Sharp Years.

The police didn't always do everything in the way they did today, neither are they condemned to repeat the same mistake up until the end of history. It will be for you to adapt the force to a city that must change.

training.train.subtitle: You can train no more than two persons at once

police.police_practice_targets.subtitle: While Crime as many form, they tend to broadly be either crimes of the rich or crimes of the poor. Both are nefarious to the lives of those that it impact though one tend to be a much worse poison to society while the other is fingered pointed at all time. It's for you to make all crime be payed in full.

options.title: Blue collar crimes (Violent Crime, Gang activity etc)
White Collar Crime (Fraud, Mob activity etc)

police.police_practice_targets_blue_coll.subtitle: The type of crime that makes most headlines. Sensational coverage from the media in addition to the current crime rate makes it a constant struggle to maintain the town credibility. However, they are not the crimes with the largest harmful crime. They are always the symptoms, never the causes for the issues we see.

police.police_practice_targets_white_col.subtitle: The type of crime which cost the most money and ruins the most lives per capita. Those don't tend to have much in the way of coverage compared to the more visceral one as a spreadsheet will always be less exciting than a bullet ridden body. However, if you wish to stem the disease at it's source, it should be through there.

options.title: Saying Yes to anyone in Authority, anyone with a badge. My parents taught me something else, lying cold on the pavement. They taught me that the world only makes sense when you force it to.
Nothing helps one put problems in perspective like allegiance to a higher cause. The Law provides that a man is innocent until proven guilty, and we must abide by it.
Vengeance blackens the soul. I've always feared that I would become that which I fought against. I walk the edge of that abyss every night, but I haven't fallen in and I thank heaven for that.

content.content: It’s been a few weeks since you’ve returned to Gotham.
The place has not changed since the incident.
Their portraits, they stared back with the same intensity as they did the first day you swore your duties.
“I do not know how to think it.”
“I have wealth, I have power, I’ve got everything. A call from the night.”
“I’ve seen it, crashing through the window, through our life,
“I have to know what’s in me,
“I have to know why the cowl chose me.”

police.police_practice_practice_policing.subtitle: Policing, in the meaning of active and aggressive search using all terms in the book as always been useful. However, it's performance to the extreme as became something closer to a numbers game made to impact public opinion. Policing will always remain, but you may change how harsh it's application is.

police.police_practice_practice_racial.subtitle: Racial Profiling, in addition to it's controversy as yet to prove itself in any way effective against crime longterm. While it does help put more people behind bars and make it look like the police is doing something, it is also fracturing the gothamite society. Gordon has officially ended those practices but their enforcement have been more difficult.

police.police_practice_supervillain.subtitle: The rise of threats that cannot be directly answered by the police force as lead to the deputizing of superheroes to answer it. While during Gordon's first tenure, it was mostly an Ad-hoc solution, it as since became the new normal, one that made the police force dependent on heroes. If the police force is to become fully independent, it needs to adapt to this change.

options.title: Crime is always upgrading it's capabilities, we must upgrade our own to keep up.
I cannot do this work alone. They are people that need my support and need it now.

content.content: As just a man, your edge over all your adversaries ready to use fire arms if not powers higher than humans is your intense training and your gear. However, while you have reached a certain plateau in your training, your gear can always be improved. Furthermore, the rest of the bat-familly can always gain much from being trained and equiped better. It's only a question on what to buy and who to train first.

police.police_practice_curative.subtitle: Some people say the police is a tool of justice, other a tool to maintain order. However, in either case, this tool as yet to achieve it's goal to stem the rise of criminality. A curative approach only go so far as it's an arm race which cannot end effectively. However, changing the position of the police on this front will require intense and constant work.

options.title: We’re out of touch, out of touch with ourselves, with each other. Still, I have hope time will bring what each of us needs. One day, we’ll find a middle where we will see each other.

We knew each other well, just not well enough. What we learned pulled us closer, what we now know is driving us apart. I hope she finds herself, but I don’t think we can reconcile. I can’t let my emotions drive me to ignore what I would never allow for anyone else.

I can’t let a white lie hide what broke. She would have broken the life of another if it sounded like the right decision to her. Perhaps she will see the wrong in that decision in the future, yet I can’t let it linger. No one has any right to the life of another.

content.content: Andrea. She was the first to see through the dark.
She was always a shoulder I could count on, from the years in doubts, to the years in shadow, to those rebuilding, she was the first to trust.
Standing in front of me, she tried to stop the murderer of her father.
No, she tried to kill the red hood. She wanted revenge.
Now, by his own fault, he’s gone, face, body burned by acid.
And yet the pain remains. It’s a silence she was looking for, and now that it was, no one wanted it.

I can see it in the blue of her eyes. I knew from the moment she told me some persons escape justice, some persons that will kill, that will destroy, that will break again, justice powerless to stop them. Someone needs to intervene, do justice in their stead.

I am not an executioner. Yet, she is willing to end life so readily. She is ready to not just be a judge or enforcer, to be the reaper. She can’t see her heart is clouding her judgement, she wants healing and no powers allows her other avenue.

She doesn’t see the patience, she sees only someone that wishes to stop her from doing what is right, what is just. The fault doesn’t just come from her, she can’t be at fault from wishing death, what so many would want.

I loved her once. Some part of me still does. She can’t see that which drove her to want to kill also drove me to never wish death on anyone. The same experience drove the two of us in completely different directions.
Now, she’s ready to go on her own, to find herself while I find myself. We may not see each other again for years, yet there's something lingering…

police.prison_reform.subtitle: During Quincy Sharp's tenure, the prison system was struck down buy a sledgehammer that it yet to completely recover from. From his introduction of Private prison to the abuse of monetized labor and more, Prisons have grown both in side and in how much they are over-extended. It will take a long time to fix what was broken.

police.prison_reform_privatization.subtitle: During his tenure, Quincy sharp as given a Massive Lease to the largest prison of the city, Blackgate Penitentiary, to a Private equity firm. The lease as been given in 1991 and will last until March of 1996. Since, it has become nothing more than a penal colony with many of the restriction of public prisons having been erased to extract greater profit from their workforce. This system must be changed.

police.prison_reform_code.subtitle: While it shouldn't be controversial, there is a coalition of groups that wish for prisoners to continue suffering and suffering hard. One part from the conservative establishment see that those practices are just the right way to deal with prisoners that have done so much damage to society, making them pay back. Others, less principled persons, have vested interest in the value they gain from parts of the operations of the penitentiary. Both will try to block reforms.

police.stone_gate.subtitle: The personal project idea of Harvey Dent. Blackgate as grown clearly insufficient to house the amount of prisoners inside of the city. As such, a brand new penitentiary complexes as been proposed on the sister islands east of Paris Island. The project will see both a greater amount of security for prisoners and for enforcers in a three base complex including a female, male a juvenile prison center.

options.title: …And swear that we two will fight together against crime and corruption and never swerve from the path of righteousness.
…And swear that we two will fight together against crime and corruption and never swerve from the path of Justice.
…And swear that we two will fight together against crime and corruption and never question the order I am given.

content.content: I’ve seen the Graysons many times before. Two seats are now empty today, yet, for a while, it’s something that felt wrong ever since the beginning of this experience.
The smile felt a bit more fake than they should. The jumps, the prestation, cracks were showing through the veneer.

For a moment it felt like rose tinted glasses slimping off, until two parents fell to their death in front of their child, staring at them twenty feet off the ground, shaking, unsure what to do, what to say, frozen in place.
Richard needs someone to help him. He needs someone to support him. Someone to protect him.
In one month, went from a ghost barely breathing to someone taking up a hood on his head to fight crime.
The reflection was crystal clear. This kid could do a lot of good, he just needed the right guidance.
Taking him as my son, with his enthusiastic consent. The robin will sing in the night.
He only had to swear on it, before me, before the city.

police.arkham_city.subtitle: As proposed by Hugo strange, you may turn the island of Arkham into a massive open air rehabilitation center for both inmates and the insane. The proposal as some controversy, however, it may be your silver bullet against crime inside of Gotham.

options.title: How much we spend and where.
I think our main goal, before any other, should be to work on those issues of the law. So many crimes are being committed each day, we would do a disservice not to act now and act decisively.

I think that if such a relationship is to remain strong, I have to keep tighter contact with Harvey. He is a massive asset and he needs to be cherished considering what happened to others in the past.

I think this issue between him and Dick can still be patched over. This is just a failure of communication. Harvey thought that Dick already hates him and Dick feels like Harvey is heartless for not mentioning the problem. We can’t build anything on hurt feelings.

content.content: The fight for justice is a lonely battle. Yet, the knowledge that someone is beside you, someone will help, it’s something that allows each night to feel a bit more tranquil than they would have usually been.

At one trial, there was an especially fiery assistant county prosecutor which caught your eye. While most in the city that practiced law used it as a way to become a vehicle for corruption, he seemed more invested in finding the truth of the crime of a simple robbery than either the police, the judge or even the defendant were.

Harvey Apollo Dent was certainly a bit of a character. While on the stand his good looks and boundless confidence made him look like the archetypical movie law man of the pulpit, meeting him in his office, he just seemed tired, feeling like he could never do enough, that so many things were out of his control.

You two found a lot in common to discuss, you found in each other the same drive to help people, the same struggle with so many people needing your help, so little time to help them. For the first time in so many years, you finally found a friend.

As you mentioned the strange case of the Graysons, he assured you to do all he could to catch him. While you could find who was the culprit and Batman could catch the man and the law should have put him behind bars, he managed to get out on a technicality.

Still, even if the wider system remains broken and tension seems to be rising between Dick and Harvey. The proof of concept is here. On the ground and on the pulpit, the power it truly had was clear as day. You only had to own it, to work out the kinks.

content.content: While not exactly the thing you prefer, as election are closing in, you are expected to campaign to the population. As an non ideological candidate, your objective was always the broadest appeal, who would you target?

options.title: You’re bullshiting me. There’s no way that this could theoretically work, let alone practically! What did you do, take my - no, I don’t even want to know. Talia, you betrayed me!
I’m here for you. I don’t know what’s going on, but whatever you’re dealing with, I will be there. For both you, and our child.
That’s a lot to take in. I’m not sure how to feel about this. I need some time, I’m sorry.

content.content: Gotham was always your home, yet your business takes you all across the globe. In the dusty streets of Shanghai, Waynecorp is one of the first to reach an open pearl, but certainly not the last. Your hotel reeks of extravagance, nothing like the carved out remote palace you lived in the last time you came to this country. You’re flipping through an issue of Times, something you’d never thought you’d say before the hotel phone blares out of nowhere. You pick up, and hear the voice of someone you’d never forget.
His daughter. The daughter of the demon. You call out her name.

“Talia. Talia Al Ghul, yes. Wayne, I understand your circumstances at this given moment, but if you have time to spare, I’d like to speak to you in person. I have quite urgent news. Please be there, Wayne.”

You wait at a local shengjian bao stand. The one right next to the hotel. By the glances given at your direction, you stand out like a sore thumb ordering food in fluent Mandarin, waiting for your meal like you’re waiting for a date. In a way you are, you suppose. Finally, she arrives. The two of you sit on stools, first talking about nothing in particular. You feel like teenagers again, but not for long.
“Wayne. Bruce Wayne. There is something I must tell you.”
She switches from Mandarin to English. Her stoic eyebrows furl in concentration.
“My father and I are raising a child.”
She glances around. The Shanghainese don’t understand a lick of what she’s saying. You’re not sure if that’s a good or a bad thing. Talia takes a deep breath in.
“You. You are the father. There was no rape, nothing remotely as such, but beyond that I cannot explain further, but that is the truth.”

options.title: You managed to catch the killer with the help of Harvey and his rummaging through the record of thousands of criminals.
You managed to catch the killer with the outstanding performance of this new commissioner, James Gordon.
You managed to catch the killer thanks to the help of your trusted sidekick complimentary skills, Dick Grayson.

content.content: Thanks to Dick’s and Harvey’s help, you begin to feel like you’re making real progress on crime in the city. Even if some of the goons you end up beating up seem to come back once, they rarely come back a second time. For the first time, you feel like you’re actually making real progress even with everything set up against you.

Someone decided to call on you, someone that inspired you when you were young with millions of others. The hero of Gotham, the Black Canary asking for the help of Batman over something that had struck on her civilian self Dinah Drake.

She had been fighting for two decades already, finding times of peace, times of tension. Yet, a year before you took the cowl, she had stopped appearing nearly to the same degree as she did before. Something was different.

While posters in people’s bedrooms showed black canary acting alone, she had someone close to her that helped her be the super hero people needed. She had found someone close, a private investigator, someone to do the paper work while she did the knuckle work.

In Larry Lance, She found someone to love, someone to marry, someone to finally settle down after years of battle. Yet, the battle would never stop, even after becoming a mother, criminals will be succeeded by new ones in a never ending cycle.

Her husband was killed, while he was always watchful of anything that could strike on him, he seems to have reached for bigger than he should. Now, she was alone with their child and yet had to continue to fight, to continue to bring hope to the people of Gotham without help, with the salary of one florist and with the free time of one parent of one child.

She found in you an opportunity to finally find closure, both to finding who killed her husband but also to finally leave her years of fighting crime knowing that the city is in safe hands. She worked hard since she was just 18, she wants to finally be the mother her daughter deserved.
You told her you will find the culprit. That you will find her husband's killer. You even gave her the necessary financial support to no longer feel on the rope each day of her life and…

options.title: Decided to tell him that you preferred staying out of politics both on ethical and business ground as the city remains deeply divided.
You agreed to grant him an endorsement in hopes that his help would bring you the support you require for your plans against poverty.
You accepted to endorse him but refused to ask for any handouts as it would just go on the same length of favors of the previous administration.

content.content: What felt like an eternal whack a mole finally began to feel like deep tangible change. As you and Robin caught the criminal, commissioner Gordon sent you the criminal he couldn’t handle and Harvey made sure that they would stay behind bar’s, you only had to expand your reach of change.

With the success Wayne incorporated was reaching thanks to Lucius’s help, you began to build your new charities for the poor, youth centers for the lost and even supported Dinah Drake’s own Canaries to help people defend themselves, you finally felt like your work was doing something.

Yet, there was something more. Even if you could do each of those things, even if you had the power, the wealth and the support needed, the rot of the city was so deep it didn’t feel like it was enough. Seeing it through Dinah’s eyes, all of the work you had done could break if any links in the chain would snap.

You had a call, one you would not refuse. Hamilton Hill, democratic candidate for the mayorship has reached to you to be one of his supporters. He claimed that he thought to help reform the city away from the corruption and self-destructive ways it became known for by all in the country.

He said that he was impressed by your work, the dynamism you brought to a city, the tangible work you do to help everyone, especially those that need it the most. All that he wanted was for you to help him help you, help him reach the mayorship so he can help you bring changes no one could have thought possible before.

Those promises always sounded more hollow when said by any politician, yet, considering his current polling numbers ranked him as most certainly winning the election, it’s quite probable he may actually be honest and truly wishing to help you and the city. He may get elected either way but you…

options.title: Focused on keeping the people safe.
Focused on Catching the escaped criminals.

content.content: You still visit his grave every week. His smile, his laughter, even his tantrums all robbed away from you, just like that. Papers line your desk both as the businessman and the caped crusader. Papers stained with tears, much to your chagrin. You don’t know what day it is. You don’t care. They all blur blue together. Ring ring ring. That must be the bell, the alarm, the - it doesn’t matter.
“Bruce. There’s been an intruder at Wayne manor.”
“Bruce. He’s set off dang near every security measure we’ve put in place, and he’s working entirely alone!”
This is just like every other hobo in every other week that tries to break and enter. This is like every other day in the whole world, Alfred. You.. Don’t… Care.

Alfred drags you over to the security cameras, where fuzzy static outlines a boy who hasn’t even reached his growth spurt yet tripping over basement stairs in an oversized Batman hoodie. He seems timid underneath his four eyes, but in any other scenario you’d applaud the fact that out of all the attempts, this is the one that succeeds. You tell Alfred to escort him out of the building. The kid doesn’t seem interested in any valuables, he’s probably just confused or something. You’re not quite sure how else to explain such a thing.

He returns, but with a catch. The kid is right behind him. As soon as he sees you, the brunette makes a run for it. He suddenly clasps your hands tight together, and says something nobody should ever know.
“Bruce Wayne! You’re- you're Batman! You need me! You need a Robin!”

options.title: I don’t believe it. This cannot be real. He can’t be serious right now. You? You WANT to be Robin? I - I. I guess we’re doing this now.
Your dad doesn’t get paid enough for this. Just give me a second, I’ll phone him and get things straight… you’re not coming back, right?
This is absurd! I’m preparing for all of this and this guy just shows up? I laugh the hardest I have in years.
Well then, let’s get you set up kid.

welcome.tim1.unavailableSubtitle: He is dead serious. He won’t leave.

welcome.tim2.unavailableSubtitle: The kid’s name is Tim Drake, you phone his dad and he’s groaning as much as you are. There’s basically nothing he can do.

welcome.tim3.unavailableSubtitle: For the first time in forever, your heart feels lighter. Maybe. Maybe this can work.

Ambitious. But this is what the city needs.
